perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman is seen sleeping in an airplane seat, reclined and covered with a blanket. She wears a grey neck pillow and has a matching grey hat pulled down over her eyes. Animated ZZZ symbols float above her head. (2) A hand enters the frame and nudges her arm. She wakes up instantly, lifting her hat to look alertly towards the person off-camera. (3) She smiles and adjusts her hat while engaging in a conversation with an off-screen flight attendant. The scene remains focused on her upper body and the airplane cabin interior.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a loud, constant low-frequency hum of an airplane engine, overlaid with a light, upbeat instrumental lo-fi track. (2) A female voice speaks in Mandarin, asking if she wants breakfast. (3) The woman on screen responds with an enthusiastic "Yao!" (Yes!). (4) The conversation continues with the off-screen voice listing menu items like porridge or eggs, and the on-screen woman jokingly asking for both, followed by a playful refusal from the flight attendant. A subtle cartoonish sound effect accompanies the moment she wakes up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) POV: 在飛機上秒醒的瞬間 (POV: When I suddenly wake up mid-flight) - Hook text establishing the scenario. (2) 空服員：要早餐嗎？ (Flight attendant: Do you want breakfast?) - Functional text translating the off-screen dialogue. (3) 要！ (Yes!) - Decorative text emphasizing her eager response. (4) 輪到我了嗎？ (Is it my turn?) - Internal monologue caption for humor. (5) 魚香菇粥還是蔬菜起司蛋？ (Fish and mushroom porridge or vegetable cheese egg?) - Functional text for menu choices. (6) 可以各來一份嗎？ (Can I have one of each?) - Humorous text showing her greediness. (7) 不行！ (No!) - Final refusal text for comedic effect.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator on screen, 1 hand of a female flight attendant visible from the side.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young female with fair skin, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a grey neck pillow, and a grey sun hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a modern airplane cabin with a window showing bright daylight, a reclining seat, and a tray table area.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mixed natural light from the airplane window and warm cabin interior lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a comedic slice-of-life vlog showing a relatable 'travel moment' where a passenger wakes up instantly at the mention of food. It uses the POV format to engage the audience while implicitly showcasing the comfort of the travel pillow and hat worn by the subject.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The brand logos for 'Travel Blue' and 'Push Pump' are clearly visible on the neck pillow, which is the central object of the sleeping scene.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of dual-language POV text and variety-show style comedic overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video successfully merges a common social trope (hunger on flights) with subtle product placement, typical of modern lifestyle influencers.
